title: Fix profiles-edge-cases.test.js — expired cache fallback assertion
description: Test 'should use expired cache when network fails' (profiles-edge-cases.test.js:340) fails because it writes a cache with llm.provider='cached-provider' but getProfile() runs matchProfile() on the cached data, which re-matches to 'ollama'. The test needs to either: (a) write cache data that matchProfile() will preserve (i.e. a proper profiles array with a profile whose config.llm.provider='cached-provider' that matches the test hardware), or (b) assert on a value that survives matchProfile(). Error: expected 'ollama' to be 'cached-provider' at line 340.
